description: Verify that the observer is disabled by default: write a .forge.json with no forgeMaster.observer block and assert observer state file is absent (no LLM cost incurred).

execute.cmd: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'); const cfg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge.json'),'utf-8')); const enabled=cfg?.forgeMaster?.observer?.enabled; if(enabled===true)throw new Error('observer must not be enabled by default, got '+enabled); const stateFile=p.join(process.cwd(),'.forge','forge-master-observer-state.json'); if(fs.existsSync(stateFile))throw new Error('observer state file must not exist when observer has never run'); console.log('ok observer mute by default');"
